maker-vault-owner.Description: A Maker Vault allows a user to deposit cryptocurrency collateral and generate Dai. Vaults are categorized by the type of collateral used to generated Dai. Users create Dai by generating it against their collateral and destroy Dai when repaying their generated Dai balance.

layer-2.Description: Layer 2 refers to several approaches to handle transactions off the main Ethereum chain. These allow for higher scalability of the network and reduced transaction fees. Examples include Optimistic and Zero-Knowledge (ZK) Rollups, Validium, Plasma and State Channels.

omg-network.Description: The OMG Network is a trustless, non-custodial, Layer-2 scaling solution for transferring value on Ethereum.

mstable.Description: mStable unifies stablecoins, lending and swapping into one standard.
